components.title: VPN Remote Access
components.description: Enterprise VPN solution providing encrypted remote access for employees and authorized contractors. Full-tunnel VPN enforced for all remote access sessions — split tunneling is prohibited. Integrated with Entra ID for MFA enforcement via RADIUS/NPS extension. Access is restricted by user group membership and device compliance policy.
components.purpose: Provide secure, authenticated, encrypted remote access to organizational systems.

control-implementations.description: Control implementations for VPN Remote Access.

implemented-requirements.description: Remote access is provided exclusively via the approved VPN solution. Direct RDP or SSH from the internet to internal systems is prohibited. VPN gateway is accessible only on designated ports; all other inbound internet access is blocked at the perimeter firewall. Split tunneling is disabled — all traffic routes through organizational infrastructure.

MFA is enforced for all VPN connections via RADIUS authentication integrated with Entra ID MFA. Supported MFA methods: Microsoft Authenticator push notification, TOTP, and FIDO2 hardware token. SMS OTP is not permitted for remote access MFA. Certificate-based device authentication (SCEP via Intune) is required in addition to user MFA.

VPN tunnels use IKEv2 with AES-256 encryption, SHA-384 integrity, and Diffie-Hellman Group 20 (384-bit elliptic curve) for key exchange. IKEv1 and PPTP are disabled. Session inactivity timeout: 30 minutes. Maximum session duration: 8 hours (re-authentication required).

VPN access is restricted by AD security group membership. Standard employees can access the corporate VLAN. Contractors are restricted to a designated contractor VLAN with access only to required resources. Privileged admin VPN access requires a separate privileged account and routes to the management VLAN.

All VPN connection attempts (successful and failed) are logged: user identity, source IP, device certificate identity, connection time, disconnection time, and bytes transferred. Logs are forwarded to the SIEM within 60 seconds and retained for 1 year. Failed authentication attempts trigger alerts at >5 failures within 5 minutes from the same source IP.

Third-party vendor remote access is provided via a dedicated VPN group with time-limited access (maximum 8-hour sessions). Vendor sessions are supervised and recorded. Access is enabled on request and disabled immediately on completion of the maintenance activity.
